title: Hardcore Enforcer
description: Forces hardcore world generation and disables cheats - Completly configurable.
body:
## Ensures an uncheatable hardcore experience by:

- Forcing newly generated worlds into hardcore mode.
- Kicking the player out of the server when they have permissions.
- Kicking the player out of the server when they have creative.
- Kicking the player out of the server if the world is not hardcore.

Everything also works in singleplayer.

Each of these can be disabled through configs.
